message:
fix(runtime/codegen): Fix test_bool failures and improve exception handling

- Fix toBoolWithDunder to properly propagate __len__ errors and set
  exception for negative values
- Add setException calls for blocked __bool__/__len__ methods (None)
- Wrap integer literals in @as(i64, ...) to avoid comptime_int forcing
  comptime evaluation in assertions
- Add exception stack push/pop for assertRaises context

All 38 test_bool tests now pass.
